## Problem Statement
What user or technical problem does this solve?

## Proposed Change
Describe the approach at a high level.

## Why This Belongs In Core
Explain why this should be merged into core instead of an optional extension/plugin.

## Risks / Tradeoffs
- Backward compatibility:
- Performance impact:
- Security/privacy impact:
- Maintenance cost:

## Rollout Plan
Phased plan and migration notes.

## Alternatives Considered
Other paths evaluated and why this is preferred.
